examples: Why do the walk the trot and the canter or lope feel so different to a rider?
They say she believes that her son will come back and they have never given up lope .
Cresting a hill, we saw six giraffe lope across an emerald basin.
Centre partner Sonny Parker took the ball in his stride to lope through the Munster line and send Jon Vaughton haring towards the left corner.
